page_content:
ENRE645 Human Reliability Analysis (3 Credits)

Methods of solving practical human reliability problems, cognitive

and behavioral modeling, task analysis, performance shaping factors, error classification, distribution of human performance and uncertainty bounds, sources of human error probability data, human error risk mitigation, examples and case studies.

ENRE648 Special Problems in Reliability Engineering (1-6 Credits) For students who have definite plans for individual study of approved problems. Credit given according to extent of work.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
